_comment: Canonical pool manifest for all Adrena offchain services (MrOracle, MrSablier, MrSablierStaking, MrAutonom, adrena-data/*). Every consumer pins this file via @adrena/abi (TS) or adrena-abi (Rust) and reads it at startup. Pool addresses are derived from `name` via get_pool_pda; custodies, syntheticCustodies and lpMint are populated post-deploy from chain reads and committed here. Consumers accept --manifest-path as a runtime override for ops flexibility; the embedded default is the source of truth otherwise. When pools are added/removed or pool feed IDs change, re-read from chain, bump this file here, regenerate configs/artifact_manifest.json, push a new adrena-abi commit, and bump the pin in every consumer repo.

pools.name: main-pool
pools._address_note: Pool PDA is fully derived from `name` via get_pool_pda — this field is redundant and kept purely for human readability (grep, log correlation). The loader asserts get_pool_pda(name).0 == address at startup so any typo is caught loudly before any RPC.
pools._oracleProviders_note: Order MUST mirror on-chain pool.multi_oracle_config.providers (enum: 0=chaoslabs, 1=autonom, 2=switchboard). Verified mainnet 2026-04-29: providers=[0,2,1] => [chaoslabs, switchboard, autonom]. Field is log/documentation-only; price selection at runtime reads MultiOracleConfig directly from the pool account.
pools._custodies_comment: On-chain order from pool.custodies[]: USDC, BONK, jitoSOL, WBTC. Read from mainnet Pool account 2026-04-21 at offset 48 with registered_custody_count=4.

pools.name: commodities-pool
pools._deployment_note: Deployed on mainnet 2026-04-23 via DAO bootstrap (6 proposals: add_pool_part_one, add_pool_part_two, set_pool_fee_config, finalize_genesis_lock_campaign permissionless, add_custody USDC, add_synthetic_custody XAU, set_pool_liquidity_state Active + set_pool_allow_trade). pool_type=Autonom(1), oracle_provider=Autonom(1), multi_oracle_config=[Autonom,Switchboard,ChaosLabs] min_agree=1 all flags off. Manager fee recipient = cortex.admin (DAO treasury). allow_swap=false (synthetic pool; users open/close positions directly).
pools._custodies_comment: On-chain order from pool.custodies[]: USDC. Read from mainnet Pool account 2026-04-23 at offset 48 with registered_custody_count=1. USDC custody derived from seed 0xea5930d76d5f59abb8d71d4acc31827425e6b89c77ba1d016183eeec25c8c463 (NOT the mint bytes — custom pool-unique seed).
pools._syntheticCustodies_comment: On-chain order from pool.synthetic_custodies[]: XAU, XAG, WTI. XAU synthetic derived from seed 0x8ae6d4e3a1126e3b8a93fc20e232da3efdcb8e7a1a593ca7d4b9426e47ae21d4. XAG synthetic derived from seed 0xcf1980f72c8fb2d54057e9ecf671e8c989283bf507ec8ad648926045aec3e784. WTI synthetic derived from seed 0xc87590370ebfc68bb661e70ddbbee34a6cd412ef465b3b5536340f5c84de8800. trade_oracle/trade_oracle_feed_id pairs: XAU=36, XAG=37, WTI=38 (all Autonom). allow_trade=true, allow_swap=false, max_cumulative_{long,short}_position_size_usd=$500k each side.
pools._feedIds_comment: release/39 canonical. Autonom range: 30-35 crypto (SOL/jitoSOL/BTC/WBTC/BONK/USDC, unsessioned), 36 XAU + 37 XAG + 38 WTI (sessioned commodities). USDC at 35 is listed because the pool's USDC stable custody needs pricing for AUM; MrAutonom's sessioned-only filter drops it from market-hours requests automatically. Future commodities append at 39+ in lockstep with configs/oracles/autonom.mainnet.json and feed_metadata.sessioned.
